Name: Dusknoir
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw 2 cards. If you have 7 or more cards in your hand, discard a number of cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. Then, put 2 damage counters on Dusknoir. This power can't be used if Dusknoir is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Count the number of damage counters on Dusknoir. Put that many damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
Prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Dusknoir by your opponent's Pokémon that has 2 or less Energy attached to it during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Empoleon
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you play Empoleon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Active Pokémon, you may use this power. Your opponent can't attach any Energy cards from his or her hand to his or her Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Empoleon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

Name: Infernape
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you play Infernape from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for up to 4 [R] Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Infernape by attacks is increased by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Discard 2 [R] Energy attached to Infernape and this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Name: Lumineon
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Lumineon is your Active Pokémon, you may look at your opponent's hand. If your opponent's Bench isn't full, choose 1 Basic Pokémon from your opponent's hand, and put it onto his or her Bench. Then, switch it with the Defending Pokémon. This power can't be used if Lumineon is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Lumineon during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Magnezone

Discard an Energy attached to Magnezone.

Name: Magnezone
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your discard pile for a [L] or [M] Energy card and attach it to your Active Pokémon. Then, put 1 damage counter on that Pokémon. This power can't be used if Magnezone is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: You may switch Magnezone with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

Name: Poké Blower +
Description: You may play 2 Poké Blower + at the same time. If you play 1 Poké Blower +, flip a coin. If heads, put 1 damage counter on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If you play 2 Poké Blower +, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Poké Drawer +
Description: You may play 2 Poké Drawer + at the same time. If you play 1 Poké Drawer +, draw a card. If you play 2 Poké Drawer +, search your deck for up to 2 cards, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Name: Poké Healer +

Name: Switch
Description: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Cyclone Energy

Name: Warp Energy

Name: Dusknoir LV.X

X as a Stadium card into play instead of discarding it. This counts as Dusknoir being Knocked Out and your opponent takes a Prize card. As long as you have Dusknoir LV. X as a Stadium card in play, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon between turns. If another Stadium card comes into play or Dusknoir LV. X is discarded by the effects of any attacks, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, Trainer, or Supporter cards, return Dusknoir LV. X to your hand.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Dusknoir. Dusknoir LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Heatran LV.X
Ability-Effect: Your opponent can't remove the Special Condition Burned by evolving or devolving his or her Burned Pokémon. (This also includes putting a Pokémon Level-Up card onto the Burned Pokémon.) Whenever your opponent flips a coin for the Special Condition Burned between turns, treat it as tails.

Once at the end of your turn, if Heatran is on your Bench, you may use this power. If you discarded basic Energy cards attached to your [R] or [M] Active Pokémon by using that Pokémon's attack this turn, attach up to 2 of those Energy cards to that Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Heatran. Heatran LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Effects: During your opponent's next turn, if Machamp would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, flip a coin. If heads, Machamp is not Knocked Out and its remaining HP becomes 10 instead.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Machamp. Machamp LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Drifloon
Ability-Effect: If Drifloon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, Drifloon's Retreat Cost is [C][C] more.
Effects: Drifloon does 50 damage to itself.

Name: Duskull
Effects: Put up to 3 damage counters on Duskull. Then, put that many damage counters on the Defending Pokémon.
Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't attach any Energy cards from his or her hand to the Active Pokémon during his or her next turn.

Name: Voltorb
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Search your discard pile for a [L] Energy card and attach it to Voltorb.
Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
